title: Sanctions Screening Latency Cascade
subtitle: Legacy adapter retry storm with FX settlement deadline
description: A high-value USD batch sweep begins failing intermittently. The sanctions screening service times out under load. Queue depth rises exponentially. The legacy COBOL hub starts retrying failed messages. FX settlement window closes in 43 minutes. Without intervention, $847M in cross-border payments will miss the cut-off.
trigger: Sanctions microservice p99 latency exceeds 12s threshold
impactSummary: 142 payments stuck across 3 corridors, $847M at risk, 3 corporate clients affected

timeline.event: Sanctions screening p99 latency spikes to 14.2s (threshold: 3s)
First payment timeout detected on US→GB corridor
Legacy adapter begins retry cycle — 3 retries per failed message
Second corridor affected: US→JP payments backing up
Third corridor impacted: US→SG showing timeouts
Sentinel Agent: Anomaly detected — multi-corridor payment failure pattern
Correlator Agent: Root cause identified — sanctions service cascading failure
Impact Agent: 142 payments, $847M at risk, FX window closes 14:53 UTC
Governance Gate: Human approval required — high-value threshold exceeded
HITL: Operator approves Option A — reroute via backup sanctions service
Recovery Agent: Executing remediation — draining queue via backup path
Verification Agent: 139/142 payments recovered, STP rate restored to 99.2%

remediationOptions.title: Reroute via Backup Sanctions Service
remediationOptions.description: Redirect queued payments to the secondary compliance screening cluster. Drain retry queue. Resume normal flow once primary stabilizes.
steps: Redirect message queue to backup sanctions endpoint
Flush 142 stuck payments through backup path

remediationOptions.title: Batch Override with Post-Hoc Screening
remediationOptions.description: Apply expedited screening using cached sanctions list (< 4 hours old). Flag all payments for mandatory post-settlement re-screening within T+1.
steps: Apply cached sanctions list (last updated 14:00 UTC)
Release 142 payments with expedited screening flag
Notify compliance team of override action
Generate audit trail for regulatory reporting

remediationOptions.title: Controlled Queue Hold + Manual Escalation
remediationOptions.description: Stabilize the queue, prevent further retries, and escalate to Ops team for manual intervention. Safest option but risks missing FX window.
steps: Halt all retry cycles on legacy adapter
Place queue in controlled hold state
